items.name_en: M62650 Blue Denim! Key Wallet Wallet Series. This zippered coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with calf leather trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard weaving technology and features a stonewashed denim effect. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm.

items.name_en: M58009 Blue Denim! This Mini Pochette Accessoires handbag is made from Monogram Denim cotton fabric, where the Monogram pattern is woven into the material. After bleaching, assembling, and sand washing, the certified cotton achieves a unique texture. It features a rounded silhouette, a zipper opening for ample storage, and can be carried by chain or hook.

items.name_en: M83616 Blue Denim! This Pochette Cosmétique makeup bag is cut into a trendy, relaxed silhouette. Fashionable faded denim tones are applied to certified cotton canvas, paired with calfskin trim and dazzling rivets. Ample space to hold cosmetics and small personal items, making it a perfect travel companion.

items.name_en: Upgraded Version ⚠️ M83532 Light Blue Denim Chain Shoulder Bag. The Liv Pochette re-adopts bleached and stonewashed Monogram denim, featuring a vintage look and a summer vibe. This small bag is designed to sit comfortably under the arm, equipped with a detachable gold metal chain and a detachable, adjustable aged natural leather strap. It is signed with a Louis Vuitton-engraved plaque. Size: 24.5 x 13.5 x 6.5 cm.

items.name_en: M83112 Canvas! (Makeup Bag) The Locker Dopp Kit combines modern style with Louis Vuitton's iconic elegance, crafted from the brand's classic Monogram Eclipse canvas. It features practical functions such as a washable lining and a comfortable, adjustable side handle. The compact design is surprisingly spacious enough to hold all essentials, perfectly blending style and utility. 23 x 13 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width).
